CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(MatchedRecordId__c), '', HYPERLINK( '/' + MatchedRecordId__c, CASE( MatchedSObjectType__c, 'LoggerScenario__c', LoggerScenario__r.Name, 'Log__c', Log__r.Name, 'LogEntry__c', LogEntry__r.Name, 'LogEntryTag__c', LogEntryTag__r.Name, 'LoggerTag__c', LoggerTag__r.Name, MatchedRecordId__c ), '_top' ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Hyperlink to the matched record, resolved from MatchedRecordId__c and the populated typed lookup (LogEntry, Log, LogEntryTag, LoggerScenario, LoggerTag). Falls back to the record ID when no typed lookup was populated.
CustomField.label: Matched Record
